_comment: SSOT registry of immutable GitHub identities used by WIF conditions/members across the Terraform roots (org-rename plan r2 #26). Slugs are informational only — IDs are what auth binds to. Captured 2026-07-11.

consumers: infra-ai-platform/infra/{wif.tf,ci.tf} (provider condition + vtt CEL + ci/plan members)
